sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92889" key="r(u/tis2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥύτις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥύσις</foreign>, in a play on words, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Democr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> </bibl> Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:p.119B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.119B.</biblScope> </bibl> </entryFree>
